title: phyllanthus holostylus
intro: Phyllanthus holostylus, also known as the Yellow Phyllanthus or Yellow Leaf, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are responsible for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and enhancing immune system function. In herbal medicine, Phyllanthus holostylus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to capsules for oral consumption.
